feedback.text: Please find a way to adhere to the spirit of the stop killing games movement and help secure consumer rights. Finding a way to curb the power of the financial services like Visa and MasterCard to decide what games are allowed to exist would be a huge accomplishment as well. Any improvements in ownership of products depending on digital licensed IP for the common consumer would also be welcome. PS: If this act leads to some positive outcomes here I will advocate for EU membership in Norway wholeheartedly from now on. Thanks for your consideration.
